ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "blurb" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "goal" REAL /* Funding goal for the project */,
  "pledged" REAL /* Amount pledged for the project */,
  "outcomes" TEXT /* Outcome of the project (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the project is located */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used for the project */,
  "deadline" INTEGER /* Deadline for the project */,
  "launched_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the project was launched */,
  "staff_pick" INTEGER /* Whether the project is a staff pick */,
  "created_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "ended_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the project ended */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the project video */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the project image */,
  "project_lead_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project lead */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backers" (
  "backer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backer */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the backer is supporting */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the backer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the backer */,
  "pledge_amount" REAL /* Amount the backer has pledged */,
  "backer_since" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the backer created their account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backers_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subcategory */,
  "parent_subcategory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent subcategory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_categories" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subcategory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "category_id", "subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "donations" (
  "donation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each donation */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "backer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the backer */,
  "donation_amount" REAL /* Amount of the donation */,
  "donation_date" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the donation was made */,
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reward chosen by the backer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("donation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donations_reward_id FOREIGN KEY ("reward_id") REFERENCES rewards ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donations_backer_id FOREIGN KEY ("backer_id") REFERENCES backers ("backer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, project lead, backer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_outcomes" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the project (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the outcome */,
  "verified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who verified the outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_outcomes_verified_by FOREIGN KEY ("verified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "average_donations" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "average_donation" REAL /* Average donation amount for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "reward_name" TEXT /* Name of the reward */,
  "reward_description" TEXT /* Description of the reward */,
  "reward_amount" REAL /* Minimum amount required to choose the reward */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rewards_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_leads" (
  "project_lead_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project lead */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is the project lead */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the project lead */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_lead_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_leads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_leads_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "update_date" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the update was made */,
  "update_text" TEXT /* Text of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_updates_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
column_names: Outcome of the project (e.g., successful, failed)

Timestamp when the project was launched

Timestamp when the project was created
